retrieval: missing evidence - retrieval system returned completely irrelevant documents
missing evidence - no chunks retrieved (empty retrieval)
missing evidence - poor retrieval combined with incorrect answer (inverted deductible explanation)
missing evidence - poor retrieval plus completely wrong answer denying escalation options
answer_quality: answer quality - completely incorrect information about ncb
answer quality - partially correct but contains critical misinformation about portability benefits
answer quality - answer contradicts expected fraud indicators (inverted logic)
citations - answer contradicts retrieved context which mentions non-network coverage
citations - answer not grounded in retrieved context which mentions waiting period
